park_name: Blue Bay Camping and Caravan Park
rationale_top3: Nature & Scenery (16/20): Strong natural setting and scenic environment highly valued by guests Cleanliness & Facilities (14/15): Well-maintained facilities and clean amenities throughout the park Entertainment & Activities (12/15): Good range of recreational activities and entertainment options for families
rationale_honourable: Value for Money (11/15): Reasonable pricing relative to facilities and location offered Location & Access (9/10): Convenient Central Coast NSW positioning with good accessibility
best_for: Nature lovers and families seeking a clean, well-maintained park in a scenic Central Coast setting
